headline: Citi Opens “Upside 90-Day Catalyst Watch” on Constellation Brands (STZ)
summary: Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE:STZ) is included among the 10 Best Dividend-Paying Beverage Stocks to Buy Now. Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE:STZ) is a leading international producer and marketer of beer, wine, and spirits with operations in the U.S., Mexico, New Zealand, and Italy. On May 18, Citi opened an “upside 90-day catalyst watch” on Constellation Brands, […]

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Underperform on Constellation Brands, Lowers Price Target to $152
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Bryan Spillane   maintains Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) with a Underperform and lowers the price target from $154 to $152.
